input.background: Assume that the product failures from an assembly line are 5%. Suppose that if a product that is defective, a diagnostic test indicates that it is defective 92% of the time, and if the product is good, the test indicates that it is good 96% of the time.
input.question: Calculate the probability that the test will indicate that the product is defective?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
